refined_caption: A rodent is visible in a hospital cage with a blanket on its back. The rodent appears to be in close proximity to a potential patient area.
complaint_description: I was visiting a patient and was shocked to see a rat in one of the hospital cages. The rat had a blanket on its back and seemed to be roaming freely. This is completely unacceptable and I'm concerned about the cleanliness and safety of the hospital.
voice_text: There's a rat in one of the hospital cages, it's even got a blanket on its back. This is disgusting and something needs to be done about it.
